title: Technical Analyst – Java, Cobol & SQL l 12 months contract
description:
We are seeking a skilled and proactive Technical Analyst to support both functional and technical aspects of enterprise applications. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience with Java, Cobol, and SQL, and an ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality solutions and support.


Key Responsibilities

Functional Support

  • Translate business needs into technical requirements.
  • Analyze and design enhancements to existing functionalities.
  • Perform data mining and testing to ensure solutions meet business objectives.
  • Collaborate with users, developers, and project leads to improve processes.

Technical Support

  • Assist in Java application development and post-implementation troubleshooting.
  • Write and optimize SQL queries for reporting and analysis.
  • Support users with technical issues and enhance system performance.

Problem Solving

  • Diagnose and resolve issues in Java/Cobol applications and SQL databases.
  • Analyze operational challenges and recommend improvements.

Team Collaboration

  • Work closely with technical teams and business stakeholders.
  • Contribute to system improvements and process automation.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field.
  • Minimum 2–3 years of experience with Java, Cobol, and SQL.
  • 2+ years in SDLC and change request implementation.
  • 2+ years in operations or BAU support.
  • Proficiency in SQL and query optimization.
  • Solid business analysis and problem-solving skills.

Interested Applicants, please email your resume to rupa.kankariya@manpower.com.sg (R1441955), stating the position as the subject title in the email.

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)

Please note that your response to this advertisement and communications with us pursuant to this advertisement will constitute informed consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of personal data by Manpower for the purpose of carrying out its business, in compliance with the relevant provisions of the Personal Data Protection Act 2012.

Employment Agency License No.: 02C3423
